subcodes.first_line: Thy letter attained the presence of the Lord of Names, and thy call was hearkened unto. God willing, at all times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بمحضر مالک اسما فائز گشت و ندایت اصغا شد انشاء الله در کل احیان بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @knowledge; recognition of God
